rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ROUPPET VS. FERGUS O'SULLIVAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 11, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANTS FERGUS O'SULLIVAN, FOS TEAM, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Moving party failed to sow that Plaintiff's complaint arises out of protected activity. Plaintiff's Request for sanctions is denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ROUPPET VS. FERGUS O'SULLIVAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 11, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT FERGUS O'SULLIVAN, FOS TEAM, INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurer is sustained without leave to amend as to the second and third causes of action for violation of SFRO. These causes of action are barred by the statute of limitations. Demurer to other causes of action on Statute of Limitations is sustained with leave to amend. No substantive opposition filed. Demurer to the cause of action for negligent misrepresentation is also sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts to support each elements to this cause of action. Demurer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BIANA CHERNOGUZ VS. GUILLERMO MANZANARES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Mandatory Relief From Order Granting Deft'S Motion For Summary Judgment; Memo Of P&A
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 11, 2015, line 7. PLAINTIFF BIANA CHERNOGUZ's Motion For Mandatory Relief From Order Granting Defendant's Motion For Summary Judgment GRANTED, Plaintiff shall file and personally serve opposition to the motion for summary judgment no later than December 14, 2015 by noon. Defendant shall file a reply, if any, no later than 4noon on December 16, 2015. Motion for Summary Judgment shall be heard on December 17, 2015. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,100 (attorney's fees) to be paid by Plaintiff's counsel to Defendant's counsel within10 days of the order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 11, 2015, line 8. PLAINTIFF MOAB INVESTMENT GROUP LLC's Motion To Compel Answers, Without Objections To Special Interrogatories Set No 1; Form Interrogatories Set No 1; Req. For Production Of Production Of Documents Set No 1 Propounded On Emma Gallo, Anthony Rose, Jane Rivers Jones, Marion Esposito And Denise Prewitt; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendants shall provide responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,060. = (501/REQ)
